## Tags
cannabis, weed, leaf

## Categories
nature

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/cannabis-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CannabisOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CannabisOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
